price: 27. [Sulaimân (Solomon)] said: "We shall see whether you speak the truth or you are (one) of the liars.
arabic: ۞ قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ

version.title: English Translation - Hilali and Khan
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into English by Taqi-ud-Din Al-Hilali and Muhsen Khan

meta.transliteration: qāla sananẓuru aṣadaqta am kunta mina al-kādhibīna
